title: MedievalWeapons
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/BuiBX6b.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/MedievalWeapons/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/MedievalWeapons/issues)


Songs of War This is a fan project of the in my opinion best Minecraft series existing :) All assets are from the creators and all credits go to them. If you haven't heard about it or never checked it out here is a link: [https://youtu.be/yCNUP2NAt-A](https://youtu.be/yCNUP2NAt-A) [Credits](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uc7YMW3AKpg&t=1152s) This mod adds weapon from the series to Minecraft.
![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/FLSU7Dd.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/PCWvqcE.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/8kds257.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/Mw95N82.png)
Specials: - Double handed axe: basic sweeping damage + blocking - Longsword: blocking - Dagger: extra damage while sneaking/invisible - Healing Staff: heals player itself and creates aura for support - Lance: extra damage while riding - Mace: chance to stun enemy - Rapier: chance to let enemy bleed - Sickle: scythe wheat


[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
